description: In OpenELIS Global, log in and navigate to the 'Validation' section from the sidebar menu to review and validate pending lab results. There should be at least one pending Glucose result in the validation queue. For each result displayed, review the test values and then click the 'Validate' or 'Accept' checkbox/button to approve the results. After selecting the results to validate, click 'Save' to confirm the validation. The OpenELIS login credentials are: username 'admin', password 'adminADMIN!'.
